# GuildForge Server Architecture Knowledge Base

## Core Principle: Every server generated by GuildForge must be worth $10+/month to the user. Basic servers with 5 channels and 3 roles are unacceptable. We deploy enterprise-grade digital ecosystems.

---

## 1. ROLE HIERARCHY RULES

### Strict Linear Ordering (top → bottom)
Roles are created in this exact order. Higher = more authority. **Never deviate.**

```
TIER 1: EXECUTIVE (top)
  ⚙️ Founder — Owner-only. NOT hoisted (avoids ego isolation). Full admin.
  🔧 Admin — Hoisted. Full admin. Backup owner accounts.

TIER 2: MODERATION
  🛡️ Moderator — Hoisted. Kick/Ban/Timeout/ManageMessages/ManageThreads.
  💡 Helper — Hoisted. ManageMessages/ManageThreads only. Community pillars.

TIER 3: VIP / ENGAGEMENT
  💎 Server Booster — Hoisted. Visual prestige for financial supporters.
  🏆 Contributor — Hoisted. Active participants or open-source contributors.
  🧪 Beta Tester — Hoisted. Early access to features.

TIER 4: LEVELING PROGRESSION (themed to match server type)
  Gaming theme: Street Crook → Hustler → Enforcer → Capo → Underboss → Mafia Boss
  Military theme: Private → Corporal → Sergeant → Lieutenant → Captain → General
  Tech theme: Newcomer → Explorer → Researcher → Engineer → Legendary
  Fantasy theme: Peasant → Squire → Knight → Paladin → Warlord → Deity
  Social theme: Newcomer → Regular → Big Brain → God Tier → Legend → Infinite IQ

TIER 5: OPT-IN NOTIFICATION ROLES (self-assign, NOT hoisted)
  📢 Announcements — Release pings
  🎁 Giveaway Ping — Competition alerts
  🎉 Event Ping — AMA/event reminders

TIER 6: INTEREST / SELF-ASSIGN (NOT hoisted, cosmetic)
  Language/stack roles: Python, Rust, JS, Go, etc.
  Platform roles: Windows, macOS, Linux
  Interest roles: Gaming, Art, Music, etc.

TIER 7: BASE MEMBER
  ✅ Verified — Default member permissions

TIER 8: PUNITIVE (bottom)
  🔇 Muted — Zero permissions. Applied by auto-mod bots.
```

### Critical: The Color Role Vulnerability
**NEVER place cosmetic/color roles above moderation roles.** A user with a high-positioned cosmetic role inherits visual authority over lower roles. If a color role sits above Moderator, a junior mod with that color role can override senior staff. All cosmetic roles go to the BOTTOM.

### Role Aesthetics
- Use emoji prefixes for visual scanning
- Use distinct colors per tier (red=admin, orange=mod, yellow=helper, pink=booster, green=contributor, purple=beta, gold=legendary, grey=base)
- Hoist: Staff + VIP tiers only. Never hoist the Owner role.

---

## 2. CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE RULES

### Category Structure (9 minimum categories for any serious server)

```
🔰 START HERE (read-only)
  👋・welcome — Welcome embed with quick links. Read-only.
  📜・rules — Community rules with escalation ladder. Read-only.
  🗺️・server-guide — Hyperlinked directory of all channels. Read-only.
  🎭・get-roles — Self-assign notification + interest roles.

📢 NEWS & UPDATES (read-only)
  📣・announcements — Official releases, milestones.
  📋・changelog — Auto-posted from CI/CD.
  🗳️・roadmap — Upcoming features with reaction voting.
  🐙・github-feed — Webhook: commits, PRs, issues.

💬 COMMUNITY
  💬・general-chat — Main hub. The public square.
  👤・introductions — New member bios. Increases psychological investment.
  🖼️・showcase — User results, screenshots, achievements.
  💡・ideas-and-feedback — Feature requests and community polls.
  🎭・off-topic — Memes, random chat. Pressure release valve.
  🤖・bot-commands — Economy grinding, XP, bot interactions. Isolates spam.

🛠️ SUPPORT
  📥・create-ticket — Private ticket creation (Ticket Tool/Carl-bot).
  🔧・installation — Setup and environment help.
  ❓・usage-questions — Product-specific Q&A.
  🐛・bug-reports — FORUM channel. Tags: [Confirmed] [Investigating] [Fixed].
  🎯・false-positives — FORUM channel. Accuracy/detection discussions.

👨‍💻 DEVELOPMENT (for open-source / tech servers)
  🏗️・contributing — PR workflow, dev setup, coding standards.
  🧠・architecture — Technical deep-dives and design discussions.
  📚・documentation — FORUM channel. Wiki-style threads.
  🔬・research — Papers, new approaches, industry analysis.
  🔄・ci-cd — Pipeline status, test coverage, releases.

🎬 [TOPIC-SPECIFIC] (varies by server type)
  Channels specific to the server's niche. Min 3, max 8.

🔊 VOICE
  🔊 Lobby — General voice. No user limit.
  💻 Dev Standup / Squad 1 — Purpose-specific. 4-5 user limit for teams.
  🎬 Watch Party — Screen sharing enabled.
  🎵 Lofi & Chill — 24/7 music bot channel.
  💤 Sleep Call — Muted ambient presence.
  🎙️ Streamer Hub — For content creators.

📊 LOGS (staff-only, hidden from members)
  📝・audit-log — Auto-fed by Carl-bot/Dyno.
  🚪・join-log — Member join/leave tracking with invite source.
  💬・message-log — Deleted/edited message tracking.

🔒 STAFF (staff-only, hidden from members)
  📢・staff-announcements — Owner → Admin directives.
  💬・mod-chat — Staff coordination.
  📋・report-queue — User reports routed here.
  📜・ticket-transcripts — Auto-archived closed tickets.
  🤖・bot-config — Bot setup and testing.
```

### Channel Modality Selection
- **Text**: Transient conversation (#general, #off-topic)
- **Forum**: Persistent knowledge (#bug-reports, #documentation, #builds-and-meta)
- **Voice**: Real-time audio (#lobby, #squad)
- **Stage**: Formal presentations, AMAs, podcasts

### Permission Synchronization
- ALWAYS sync channel permissions to parent category
- Read-only channels: Deny SendMessages for @everyone, Allow for Admin
- Staff channels: Deny ViewChannel for @everyone, Allow for Admin + Mod
- Muted role: Deny SendMessages + AddReactions + Connect on ALL categories

### Naming Conventions
- Emoji prefix + interpunct (・) + lowercase-kebab: `💬・general-chat`
- Unicode formatting for aesthetic servers: `╭・rules`, `┊・roles`, `╰・introductions`
- Category names: ALL CAPS with emoji prefix: `🔰 START HERE`

---

## 3. RICH EMBEDS (minimum 5 per server)

### Required Embeds
1. **Welcome** — Logo, description, quick links, getting started steps with channel references
2. **Rules** — Numbered rules with emoji bullets, escalation ladder in code block
3. **Server Guide** — Channel directory with clickable `<#channel_id>` references
4. **Role Selection** — Notification + interest roles with reaction emojis
5. **Bot Stack** — Recommended bots table with invite links

### Embed Best Practices
- Use Discord Markdown: headers (#/##/###), code blocks (```fix), subtext (-#)
- Include masked links: `[text](url)`
- Use color coding: Red for rules, Blue for info, Green for roles, Purple for features
- Footer attribution: `-# ⚡ Architected by GuildForge`

---

## 4. BOT ECOSYSTEM RECOMMENDATIONS

### Essential Infrastructure (every server needs these)
| Bot | Purpose | Why |
|-----|---------|-----|
| Carl-bot | Reaction roles, logging, embeds, auto-mod | 12.1M servers. Industry leader for role management |
| Dyno | Audit logs, anti-spam, heavy-traffic resilience | 10.6M servers. Gold standard for logging |
| Sapphire | All-rounder utility, thread management | Best free alternative to MEE6 |
| Ticket Tool | Private support tickets | 4.45M servers. Essential for any support workflow |
| Xenon | Full server backup and restore | Disaster recovery. Non-negotiable |

### Engagement & Growth
| Bot | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| Arcane | XP leveling, voice tracking, role rewards |
| Tatsu | Reputation economy, virtual pets, decoration |
| GiveawayBot | Reaction-based giveaways |
| Apollo / Sesh | Event scheduling with RSVP |
| Statbot | Server analytics and metrics |

### Security Note
**NEVER grant bots Administrator permission.** Strip `&permissions=8` from invite URLs. Create dedicated bot roles with granular, least-privilege permissions.

---

## 5. GAMIFICATION & ECONOMY

### XP/Leveling System
- Reward text messages and voice channel time
- Anti-spam cooldowns to prevent XP farming
- Blacklist #bot-commands from XP generation
- Level roles auto-assigned at thresholds (Level 1, 10, 25, 50, 75, 100)
- Global multipliers during events (+100% XP weekends)

### Virtual Economy
- Custom currency symbol (themed emoji)
- Earning: /work, /daily, /harvest + passive voice/text rewards
- Sinks: /coinflip, /slots, /roulette (with bet limits to prevent hyperinflation)
- Shop: Custom roles, profile wallpapers, un-mute passes, VIP channel access

---

## 6. SERVER ARCHETYPE TEMPLATES

### Gaming Server
- LFG channels sorted by region (#lfg-north-america, #lfg-europe)
- Builds/meta FORUM channel
- Voice channels with user limits (4/4 for squads)
- Competitive rank roles (Bronze → Diamond → Champion)

### Tech/Open-Source Server
- Language-specific channels (#python, #rust, #javascript)
- Forum for documentation and bug reports
- GitHub webhook integration
- Job board and project showcase
- Newbie corner (psychologically safe beginner space)

### Social/Aesthetic Server
- Unicode-formatted channel names
- Pronoun and MBTI self-assign roles
- Selfie/photography channels
- Lofi music + sleep call voice channels
- Soft pastel role colors

### Creator/Influencer Server
- Subscriber-tiered access
- Content showcase/portfolio channels
- Collaboration/networking forums
- Event scheduling for streams/uploads

### Business/SaaS Server
- Tiered subscription roles (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
- Ticket-based customer support
- Product changelog and roadmap
- API documentation forum
- Onboarding guide with link to docs

---

## 7. SECURITY PROTOCOLS

### Anti-Raid
- Server verification level: MEDIUM minimum (verified email required)
- Mandatory 2FA for all staff roles
- Activate Discord's native Raid Protection
- Deploy Wick bot for CAPTCHA on mass-join events

### Incident Response
1. Quarantine suspicious accounts immediately (assign Muted role)
2. Review audit logs for unauthorized permission changes
3. Rotate API keys if compromise suspected
4. Restore from Xenon backup if structural damage

### Data Handling
- GDPR/CCPA compliant: provide data deletion mechanism
- Auto-purge verification photos (if age-gated)
- No PII in public channels
- Ticket transcripts in staff-only channels

---

## 8. ONBOARDING FLOW

### Native Discord Onboarding (preferred over reaction gates)
1. Configure 7+ Default Channels visible to @everyone
2. Create pre-join questions for interest segmentation
3. Auto-assign roles based on answers
4. Show Server Guide as landing page
5. Encourage first message in #introductions

### First 60 Seconds Goal
User must: See welcome → Read rules → Grab roles → Know where to go → Feel they belong
